title: Release Decision Manifest
description: Schema for build/release-decision.json describing the promotion decision, rejected models, and API-vs-DB metadata conflicts.

promoted.description: The model id chosen for promotion, or null when nothing was promoted.

reasons.description: Human-readable reasons the model was not promoted.

conflicts.description: One entry per API-vs-DB metadata discrepancy.

field.description: The field that disagreed, e.g. "auc" or "feature_hash".

api_value.description: The value reported by the registry API (any JSON type).

db_value.description: The canonical value from the H2 experiment DB (any JSON type).

canonical_source.description: Which source was treated as canonical for this field.
